'''Vesps''' were poisonous lizards that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. They typically fought in pairs and attempted to encircle their prey, attacking it with their spiked tail.<ref name="SWG:V" /> Several races existed on Lok, including Desert Vesps, Gorge Vesps and Mountain Vesps.

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the collector [[Breac Slaus]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of vesps.<ref name="SWG:VH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Vesp Hunter}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Vesp_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Vesps appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
